verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.preheader: Confirm your email to activate your BlindPass workspace
verification.heading: Email Verification
verification.body: Click the button below to verify your email address and activate your workspace.
verification.fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this URL into your browser:
verification.footer: You received this email because someone registered a BlindPass workspace with this address. If this wasn't you, you can safely ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.heading: Password Reset
passwordReset.body: Click the button below to set a new password for your workspace account.
passwordReset.fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this URL into your browser:
passwordReset.footer: You received this email because a password reset was requested for your BlindPass account. If this wasn't you, you can safely ignore this email.

common.securityNote: For security, never share this link with anyone.
common.supportLine: If you need help, contact your workspace administrator.
